top_signals.title: Video purportedly shows Ukrainian unit running down Russian Shahed. The US is paying attention.
top_signals.summary: An unverified video of Ukrainian unit taking down a Shahed drone with an American-made interceptor comes as the U.S. Army seeks to field drones at scale.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EthLabs launches as Ethereum undergoes its biggest leadership transition in years
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Chip stocks that notched record rallies in second quarter start Q3 with a dud
top_signals.summary: Memory maker Micron, which jumped over 240% in the second quarter, dropped 11% on Wednesday, wiping out nearly $200 billion of market capitalization.

top_signals.title: Apple seeks to buy Chinese-made memory chips by lobbying U.S.
top_signals.summary: The iPhone maker wants to reduce the impact of a global memory shortage that's forced it to raise prices across its product line.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Turning Indicators into Intelligence in OpenCTI with Criminal IP
top_signals.summary: Threat intelligence is only as useful as the context behind it. Criminal IP explains how its integration enriches threat indicators in OpenCTI with risk scoring, infrastructure intelligence, and phishing analysis. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
